choices.text: Three: Tower (airport surface to ~3k ft), TRACON (terminal area ~30 NM out, departures/arrivals), Center/ARTCC (enroute cruise altitudes, 20 centers cover U.S.). Continuous handoffs maintain coverage.

NOT ATC; advisory service. Weather briefings (1-800-WX-BRIEF), flight plan filing, airport advisories at uncontrolled fields, lost aircraft assistance. Contracted to Leidos. Use before flight; not during for control.
